column7: Typo – If you are able to target the English Language Text exclusively, then this correction should be made Global, as there never will be the letter "ḍ" in the English Translation!
Typo – Please note that this is a "print change". The Great Andhrabharati has confirmed this correction here: https://github.com/sanskrit-lexicon/csl-corrections/issues/119#issuecomment-4844057406
